item.title: 2025 LGBTQ Priorities - Washington Senate Democrats

item.title: ❓James McMahan - WA Assoc Sheriffs & Police Chiefs
item.description: James McMahan signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent WA Assoc Sheriffs & Police Chiefs.

item.title: 👍Penny Sweet - Council Member, City of Kirkland
item.description: Penny Sweet signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Council Member, City of Kirkland.

item.title: ❓💵Brad Banks - Washington State Association of Counties
item.description: Brad Banks signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Washington State Association of Counties. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍💵Ethan Frenchman - Columbia Legal Services
item.description: Ethan Frenchman signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Columbia Legal Services. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: Here are the bills signed into law this week in Washington state | king5.com
